requirement_topic.en: Conformity Assessment — PECAE Pre-Shipment Programme + Certificate of Conformity (Cameroon / ANOR)
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定——PECAE装运前计划 + 符合性证书（喀麦隆/ANOR）
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定——PECAE裝運前計畫 + 符合性證書（喀麥隆/ANOR）

summary.en: Cameroon operates a mandatory conformity-assessment programme for regulated imported products, administered through ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite) and a pre-shipment evaluation programme commonly referenced as PECAE (Programme d evaluation de la conformite avant embarquement). For regulated electrical and household products such as refrigerators, the importer/exporter must obtain a Certificate of Conformity before goods are shipped or before customs clearance at the ports of Douala or Kribi. The programme typically involves one of several routes: per-shipment inspection, product registration, or licensing for repeat shipments, supported by test reports demonstrating conformity to the applicable Cameroonian standard (NC) — generally an adoption of the relevant IEC standard (for refrigerators, IEC 60335-2-24 for safety). Without a valid Certificate of Conformity, regulated goods can be detained, refused entry, or penalised at the port. Exporters should engage the designated PECAE inspection body early to confirm the route, required test reports, and HS-code coverage.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆对受监管的进口产品实施强制性合格评定计划，由ANOR（喀麦隆标准与质量署）管理，并通过通常称为PECAE（装运前合格评定计划，Programme d evaluation de la conformite avant embarquement）的装运前评估计划执行。对于电冰箱等受监管的电气及家用产品，进口商/出口商须在货物装运前或在杜阿拉或克里比港清关前取得符合性证书。该计划通常包含若干路径之一：逐批检验、产品注册或针对重复装运的许可，并以证明符合适用喀麦隆标准（NC）的检测报告为支撑——该标准通常为相关IEC标准的采用（电冰箱安全采用IEC 60335-2-24）。无有效符合性证书的受监管货物可能在港口被扣留、拒绝入境或处罚。出口商应尽早联系指定的PECAE检验机构，确认路径、所需检测报告及HS编码覆盖范围。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆對受監管的進口產品實施強制性合格評定計畫，由ANOR（喀麥隆標準與質量署）管理，並通過通常稱為PECAE（裝運前合格評定計畫，Programme d evaluation de la conformite avant embarquement）的裝運前評估計畫執行。對於電冰箱等受監管的電氣及家用產品，進口商/出口商須在貨物裝運前或在杜阿拉或克里比港清關前取得符合性證書。該計畫通常包含若干路徑之一：逐批檢驗、產品註冊或針對重複裝運的許可，並以證明符合適用喀麥隆標準（NC）的檢測報告為支撐——該標準通常為相關IEC標準的採用（電冰箱安全採用IEC 60335-2-24）。無有效符合性證書的受監管貨物可能在港口被扣留、拒絕入境或處罰。出口商應盡早聯繫指定的PECAE檢驗機構，確認路徑、所需檢測報告及HS編碼覆蓋範圍。

standards_or_laws: PECAE — Programme d evaluation de la conformite avant embarquement (Cameroon pre-shipment conformity-assessment programme, administered via ANOR)
ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite) — issuance of Certificate of Conformity against Cameroonian standards (NC)
NC / IEC 60335-2-24 — applicable refrigerator safety standard underlying the conformity assessment
Ports of entry: Douala, Kribi — customs clearance contingent on valid Certificate of Conformity for regulated goods

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before domestic sale, plus the China Energy Label (GB 12021.2) for energy. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification issued by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs); it is a domestic-market certification and is not a pre-shipment export-inspection programme. There is no Chinese equivalent of a destination-country Certificate of Conformity issued by a foreign standards body for import clearance — a Chinese CCC certificate addresses domestic compliance only and does not satisfy Cameroon's PECAE conformity-assessment requirement.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在国内销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并须取得能效方面的中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）颁发的强制性第三方认证；其为国内市场认证，并非装运前出口检验计划。中国没有由境外标准机构为进口清关颁发的目的国符合性证书的等同制度——中国CCC证书仅涉及国内合规，不满足喀麦隆PECAE合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在國內銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並須取得能效方面的中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）頒發的強制性第三方認證；其為國內市場認證，並非裝運前出口檢驗計畫。中國沒有由境外標準機構為進口清關頒發的目的國符合性證書的等同制度——中國CCC證書僅涉及國內合規，不滿足喀麥隆PECAE合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory domestic certification; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — based on GB 12021.2 (domestic energy labelling)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain a Cameroon Certificate of Conformity under the PECAE programme — a destination-country requirement with no Chinese equivalent: (1) a CCC certificate does not substitute; the exporter/importer must route the shipment through the designated PECAE inspection body and obtain a Certificate of Conformity referencing the applicable NC / IEC 60335-2-24; (2) the assessment route (per-shipment inspection vs product registration vs licence) should be chosen based on shipment frequency; (3) test reports must demonstrate conformity to IEC 60335-2-24 — a Chinese CCC report (GB 4706.13, derived from IEC 60335-2-24) may be accepted as supporting evidence after review, but the PECAE body, not CNCA, issues the Certificate of Conformity; (4) clearance at Douala / Kribi is contingent on presenting the valid certificate; goods arriving without one risk detention or refusal. Engage the PECAE body before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须依据PECAE计划取得喀麦隆符合性证书——这是无中国等同物的目的国要求：（1）CCC证书不能替代；出口商/进口商须通过指定的PECAE检验机构办理装运并取得引用适用NC/IEC 60335-2-24的符合性证书；（2）评定路径（逐批检验、产品注册或许可）应根据装运频率选择；（3）检测报告须证明符合IEC 60335-2-24——中国CCC报告（GB 4706.13，源自IEC 60335-2-24）经审核后可作为支持性证据，但由PECAE机构而非CNCA签发符合性证书；（4）杜阿拉/克里比清关以出示有效证书为前提；无证书到港货物面临扣留或拒绝。装运前请联系PECAE机构。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須依據PECAE計畫取得喀麥隆符合性證書——這是無中國等同物的目的國要求：（1）CCC證書不能替代；出口商/進口商須通過指定的PECAE檢驗機構辦理裝運並取得引用適用NC/IEC 60335-2-24的符合性證書；（2）評定路徑（逐批檢驗、產品註冊或許可）應根據裝運頻率選擇；（3）檢測報告須證明符合IEC 60335-2-24——中國CCC報告（GB 4706.13，源自IEC 60335-2-24）經審核後可作為支持性證據，但由PECAE機構而非CNCA簽發符合性證書；（4）杜阿拉/克里比清關以出示有效證書為前提；無證書到港貨物面臨扣留或拒絕。裝運前請聯繫PECAE機構。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated products — a Certificate of Conformity under the PECAE pre-shipment programme is required before customs clearance at Douala / Kribi; administered via ANOR
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label required before sale in China; not an export pre-shipment programme

source.publisher: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite, Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Cameroon Certificate of Conformity under the PECAE pre-shipment programme (administered via ANOR) is a hard gate for regulated refrigerators — without it, goods risk detention or refusal at Douala / Kribi. A Chinese CCC certificate does not substitute; CCC test reports to GB 4706.13 (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) may support the assessment, but the PECAE body issues the certificate. Engage the designated inspection body before shipment to confirm route and HS-code coverage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] PECAE装运前计划下的喀麦隆符合性证书（经ANOR管理）是受监管电冰箱的强制性门槛——无此证书，货物在杜阿拉/克里比面临扣留或拒绝。中国CCC证书不能替代；依据GB 4706.13（IEC 60335-2-24基准）的CCC检测报告可支持评定，但由PECAE机构签发证书。装运前请联系指定检验机构确认路径及HS编码覆盖范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] PECAE裝運前計畫下的喀麥隆符合性證書（經ANOR管理）是受監管電冰箱的強制性門檻——無此證書，貨物在杜阿拉/克里比面臨扣留或拒絕。中國CCC證書不能替代；依據GB 4706.13（IEC 60335-2-24基準）的CCC檢測報告可支持評定，但由PECAE機構簽發證書。裝運前請聯繫指定檢驗機構確認路徑及HS編碼覆蓋範圍。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer of Record + French-Language Documentation (Cameroon)
requirement_topic.zh: 境内注册进口商 + 法语文件（喀麦隆）
requirement_topic.zht: 境內註冊進口商 + 法語文件（喀麥隆）

summary.en: Importation of refrigerators into Cameroon requires a locally established importer of record — a Cameroon-registered entity holding the importer registration (carte de contribuable / importer registration) responsible for customs declaration, payment of duties and VAT, and presentation of the Certificate of Conformity at clearance. In addition, product documentation, instructions, safety notices, warranty terms, and consumer-facing labelling should be provided in French (Cameroon is officially bilingual French/English, but French dominates commercial and customs documentation). The in-country importer interfaces with ANOR / the PECAE inspection body and with Cameroon Customs at Douala or Kribi. A foreign manufacturer cannot clear goods into Cameroon without an in-country importer; there is no direct foreign-self-clearance route comparable to having no local representative.
summary.zh: 向喀麦隆进口电冰箱须有本地设立的注册进口商——即持有进口商登记（纳税人卡/进口商登记）的喀麦隆注册实体，负责报关、缴纳关税及增值税，并在清关时出示符合性证书。此外，产品文件、说明书、安全提示、保修条款及面向消费者的标识应以法语提供（喀麦隆官方为法语/英语双语，但商业及海关文件以法语为主）。境内进口商对接ANOR/PECAE检验机构及杜阿拉或克里比的喀麦隆海关。外国制造商无境内进口商不能将货物清关进入喀麦隆；不存在可与无本地代表相比的外国自行清关直接路径。
summary.zht: 向喀麥隆進口電冰箱須有本地設立的註冊進口商——即持有進口商登記（納稅人卡/進口商登記）的喀麥隆註冊實體，負責報關、繳納關稅及增值稅，並在清關時出示符合性證書。此外，產品文件、說明書、安全提示、保固條款及面向消費者的標識應以法語提供（喀麥隆官方為法語/英語雙語，但商業及海關文件以法語為主）。境內進口商對接ANOR/PECAE檢驗機構及杜阿拉或克里比的喀麥隆海關。外國製造商無境內進口商不能將貨物清關進入喀麥隆；不存在可與無本地代表相比的外國自行清關直接路徑。

standards_or_laws: Cameroon importer-of-record requirement — locally registered entity with importer registration (carte de contribuable) responsible for customs and conformity presentation
French-language documentation — product instructions, safety notices, warranty, and consumer labelling (Cameroon officially bilingual; French dominant in commerce and customs)
Cameroon Customs (Douane) — clearance at Douala / Kribi via the in-country importer

summary.en: Under the Chinese domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is the responsible party for domestic-market compliance; for exports, Chinese manufacturers commonly appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis but have no statutory obligation under Chinese law to designate a destination-country importer of record. Product documentation for the Chinese domestic market is provided in Chinese. There is no Chinese-law requirement to provide French-language documentation or to appoint a Cameroon-registered importer — these are destination-country obligations.
summary.zh: 在中国国内CCC制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方；出口方面，中国制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但中国法律无指定目的国注册进口商的法定义务。面向中国国内市场的产品文件以中文提供。中国法律无提供法语文件或委任喀麦隆注册进口商的要求——这些是目的国义务。
summary.zht: 在中國國內CCC制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方；出口方面，中國製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但中國法律無指定目的國註冊進口商的法定義務。面向中國國內市場的產品文件以中文提供。中國法律無提供法語文件或委任喀麥隆註冊進口商的要求——這些是目的國義務。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent requiring a destination-country importer of record or French-language documentation
Chinese domestic documentation is provided in Chinese under the CCC regime

gap.en: Two destination-country obligations with no Chinese analogue: (1) In-country importer of record — Chinese manufacturers must sell through, or appoint, a Cameroon-registered importer who handles customs declaration, duty/VAT payment, and presentation of the PECAE Certificate of Conformity; without one, goods cannot clear Douala / Kribi; (2) French-language documentation — instructions, safety notices, warranty, and consumer labelling must be translated into French; Chinese-language documentation is not accepted for the consumer-facing requirements. These are practical commercial-and-legal gaps rather than technical product gaps, but they are blocking: a fully compliant refrigerator still cannot enter Cameroon without an importer of record and French documentation. Cameroon does not impose an EU-style authorised-representative regime; the local importer fulfils the responsible-operator function.
gap.zh: 两项无中国类似规定的目的国义务：（1）境内注册进口商——中国制造商须通过或委任喀麦隆注册进口商，由其办理报关、缴纳关税/增值税并出示PECAE符合性证书；无此进口商，货物不能在杜阿拉/克里比清关；（2）法语文件——说明书、安全提示、保修及消费者标识须译为法语；中文文件不被面向消费者的要求接受。这些属实务性商业及法律差距而非技术产品差距，但具阻断性：完全合规的电冰箱在无注册进口商及法语文件时仍不能进入喀麦隆。喀麦隆不实施欧盟式授权代表制度；本地进口商履行责任运营商职能。
gap.zht: 兩項無中國類似規定的目的國義務：（1）境內註冊進口商——中國製造商須通過或委任喀麥隆註冊進口商，由其辦理報關、繳納關稅/增值稅並出示PECAE符合性證書；無此進口商，貨物不能在杜阿拉/克里比清關；（2）法語文件——說明書、安全提示、保固及消費者標識須譯為法語；中文文件不被面向消費者的要求接受。這些屬實務性商業及法律差距而非技術產品差距，但具阻斷性：完全合規的電冰箱在無註冊進口商及法語文件時仍不能進入喀麥隆。喀麥隆不實施歐盟式授權代表制度；本地進口商履行責任運營商職能。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Cameroon-registered importer of record is required for customs clearance at Douala / Kribi; French-language consumer documentation/labelling required. No EU-style authorised-representative regime; the local importer is the responsible operator
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese law does not require a destination-country importer of record or French-language documentation; domestic documentation is in Chinese

source.publisher: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite, Cameroun) / Cameroon Customs (Douanes camerounaises)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Cameroon-registered importer of record and French-language documentation are practical hard gates for refrigerator imports — even a technically compliant unit cannot clear Douala / Kribi without them. There is no EU-style authorised-representative regime; the local importer fulfils the responsible-operator role, handles customs and duty/VAT, and presents the PECAE Certificate of Conformity. Appoint the importer and prepare French documentation before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆注册进口商及法语文件是电冰箱进口的实务性强制门槛——即使技术合规的产品，无此条件也不能在杜阿拉/克里比清关。喀麦隆无欧盟式授权代表制度；本地进口商履行责任运营商职能，办理海关及关税/增值税，并出示PECAE符合性证书。装运前请委任进口商并准备法语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆註冊進口商及法語文件是電冰箱進口的實務性強制門檻——即使技術合規的產品，無此條件也不能在杜阿拉/克里比清關。喀麥隆無歐盟式授權代表制度；本地進口商履行責任運營商職能，辦理海關及關稅/增值稅，並出示PECAE符合性證書。裝運前請委任進口商並準備法語文件。
